# Purav Parab's personal website

> This is Purav Parab's personal website. Purav Parab is a software engineer and this website aims to showcase his projects, reading and other content.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.purav.co): Homepage
- [Reading](https://www.purav.co/reading): Reading list
- [Projects](https://www.purav.co/projects): A list of projects
- [Tech Stack](https://www.purav.co/techstack): Technology Stack
- [Contact](https://www.purav.co/contact): How to contact Purav Parab

## Contact
- [X/Twitter](https://www.purav.co/contact/x): X.com or twitter profile
- [Github](https://www.purav.co/contact/github): Github profile
- [Email](puravparab+llms@gmail.com): Email address
- [Linkedin](https://www.purav.co/contact/linkedin): Linkedin profile
